subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablih-Karim! We have hearkened unto thy call. God willing, mayest thou, in the days and nights, be an observer of Truth and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل کریم ندایت را شنیدیم انشاء الله در لیالی و ایام بحق ناظر باشی و
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @contention and conflict, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
